data.title: Pet Treats Market worth $58.71 billion by 2031- Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ predicts significant growth in the pet treats market. The market, currently valued at USD 38.40 billion in 2026, is projected to reach USD 58.71 billion by 2031, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.9%. This growth trend is expected to continue from 2022 to 2031.

data.title: Telesat donates satellite capacity to support Venezuela’s recovery efforts
data.description: Telesat GEO Inc., a subsidiary of Telesat Corporation (TSX: TSAT), a major satellite operator, revealed today that they are providing high-power satellite capacity to Top Comunications, a prominent Venezuelan telecommunications firm. The donated satellite capacity aims to aid in the disaster recovery operations in Venezuela after the recent destructive earthquakes.

data.title: VERAXA Biotech Initiates Cell Line Development with ATUM to Advance its Lead BiTAC®-TCE Program
data.description: VERAXA Biotech has reported continued advancement in their primary BiTAC® T-cell engager (BiTAC-TCE) program, as they have commenced cell line development in collaboration with ATUM. This development marks a significant step forward in the project, with the company aiming to leverage this progress to further enhance their research and innovation capabilities.

data.title: BioCryst Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that the compensation committee of its board of directors has provided nine incoming employees with stock options to acquire a total of 33,950 shares, alongside restricted stock units (RSUs) for a total of 91,750 shares of BioCryst common stock. This grant, given on July 1, 2026, was deemed essential to attract these new employees. The allocation of options and RSUs adhered to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. expands into 11th state with Pennsylvania dispensary license acquisition.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that over 1,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of cases in the country to more than 50,000. Additionally, there have been 15 new deaths reported, bringing the total death toll to 2,500. Health officials are urging the public to continue practicing safety measures such as wearing masks and social distancing to help curb the spread of the virus. In response to the current situation, authorities are considering implementing stricter lockdown measures in highly affected areas.

data.title: IREN Appoints Chief Product Officer and Chief Development Officer
data.description: On July 2, 2026, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) revealed the hiring of Kambiz Aghili as Chief Product Officer and Michael Nudelman as Chief Development Officer.

data.title: Akamai Technologies schedules Q2 2026 investor call for Aug 6, 4:30 PM ET.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.2%, which is the highest recorded level in the past five years. The number of job losses in the last month alone amounted to 250,000, with a significant impact on the service industry. Additionally, the GDP growth forecast for the next quarter has been revised downward to 2.5%, reflecting the economic challenges faced by the nation. The government has announced plans to introduce new stimulus measures to address the rising unemployment and boost the economy.

data.title: Tenax Therapeutics reveals groundbreaking LEVEL Clinical Trial results at ESC Congress 2026. #medicalresearch #TenaxTherapeutics
data.description: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has declined to 4.2%, marking the lowest rate in the last decade. The labor force participation rate also saw an increase, standing at 63.8%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing analysts' expectations. This positive trend is attributed to various factors, including robust job growth in the manufacturing and healthcare sectors. The average hourly wage saw a modest increase of 2.5% compared to the previous year. Overall, the current state of the economy seems to be showing signs of steady improvement and resilience.

data.title: Adaptive Sound Technologies, Inc. Launches Sleep Only, a Mobile App Bringing Science-Backed Sleep Audio Anywhere
data.description: Adaptive Sound Technologies, Inc. (ASTI) has introduced a new mobile app called Sleep Only in Campbell, Calif., on July 2, 2026. This distraction-free app provides non-looping, adaptive sleep sounds created by the same makers of LectroFan and Sound+Sleep systems. The app aims to assist individuals in achieving better sleep quality by offering a variety of calming sounds.

data.title: Jacobs secures owner’s engineer role for wind farm project in South Australia
data.description: In Dallas, it was announced that Jacobs has been chosen as the owner's engineer for a wind farm project in Australia. This project will support the country's renewables portfolio and energy goals. This partnership showcases Jacobs' commitment to sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Baidu Announces Record Date for Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Baidu, Inc. disclosed that the record date for assessing eligibility will be set. Baidu, a prominent AI company with robust internet roots, operates under the tickers Nasdaq: BIDU, HKEX: 9888 (HKD Counter), and 89888 (RMB Counter).

data.title: Eaton Accelerates Sustainability Impact with 40% Emissions Reduction and $2.1B in R&D Investment
data.description: Eaton (NYSE: ETN), an intelligent power management company, recently released its 2025 Sustainability Report in Dublin. The report showcases the company's significant progress and increased emphasis on achieving widespread impact. In response to the growing complexity of global power management needs, Eaton is introducing innovative solutions to assist customers in enhancing efficiency, bolstering resilience, and minimizing their ecological footprint. Moreover, the company is actively working on improving transparency and accountability throughout its operations. data.title: Foodservice Paper Bag Market to Reach USD 8.9 Billion by 2036 as Takeaway Culture and Sustainable Food Packaging Accelerate Demand Across Global Foodservice Industry
data.description: In a recent report by Future Market Insights (FMI), it was revealed that the global foodservice paper bag market is witnessing significant growth. This growth is attributed to the increasing adoption of paper-based packaging solutions by various establishments such as restaurants, cafés, bakeries, and food delivery platforms. The analysis forecasts a sustained expansion phase for the market, indicating promising prospects for the industry. This shift towards paper bags is driven by environmental concerns and the rising demand for sustainable packaging options. The market research suggests that the foodservice paper bag market is set to experience continued growth in the coming years, with estimates pointing towards a substantial increase in market size. This trend underscores the importance of eco-friendly packaging solutions in the foodservice sector.

data.title: Lindsay Corporation Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
data.description: Lindsay Corporation, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of irrigation and infrastructure technology worldwide, disclosed its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results concluding on May 31, 2026. Notable figures include an 8% rise in infrastructure revenues, bolstered by consistent growth in road safety products. Additionally, an international irrigation project in the Middle East North Africa (MENA) region is progressing as planned. Lindsay Corporation is traded on the NYSE under the symbol LNN.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable to Host Second Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Brookfield Renewable announced that it will host its Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call and Webcast on July 31, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the event is to review the company's performance and discuss upcoming business strategies. Brookfield Renewable is listed on the NYSE under the tickers BEP and BEPC, as well as on the TSX under BEP.UN and BEPC.
